reviews.review_description: This is such a fun, great game even with it still being developed.  It is like playing the old game "Battleship", but everything takes place in space.  It can be played solo against the computer or against a family member or friend or you can go online and play against strangers throughout the Galaxy.  When you make it to mission 4, they add a special missile that can destroy three plot points at once, big advantage. They also have two more advantages later in the game that I have not opened yet. I cannot wait to see where this game goes from here. At only $4.99 NOW is the time to pick this game up before it is finished and goes up in price.
This is such an awesomely well made game so well thought out The graphics are top-notch well worth over 20 to $30 for this game! can't believe the sale it's on! Devs you hit a home run well done!
Could not get the game to run.  Crashes on start .

developer_response.body:
Hi Jones1876, Sorry to hear you're having trouble. We haven't had any other reports of this happening, and cant reproduce it. Can you email info@popupasylum.co.uk and we'll try to help resolve the issue. 

[EDIT] We're noticing this crash happening on V83 of the OS. Hopefully updating to V85 will resolve the issue.  

Thanks

reviews.review_description:
Augmented Reality on your table
Straight forward game with space theme!

I'm a sucker for these new-age "tabletop"games. I think I am one of the few people who used to prefer board games rather than computer games in the early 80s. Fond memories of me and my whole family sitting around the coffee table playing games like Monopoly, battleship, clue etc.  unfortunately. Nowadays we all have our own busy lives to live and do not have the time to sit down and play board games together. That is where the new age of gaming comes in. This game is fast becoming one of my favourites. I already have most of the digital board games on the quest and other systems. Playing with like minded people online really brings back fond memories for me (and you do not have to clean up after either). Maybe I am a bit weird preferring games like this to the traditional "headless chicken" running FPS games.

Like everyone else is saying, this is battleship! 

This is a good game! As is, this is a perfect game! 

Don’t think just download!  We need more people playing! 

The game is better with friends who has the game and you create a private room  , public lobby’s seems empty all the time.  

Devs- keep adding to it, maybe options for bigger grids, more ammo types, cloaking, go nuts!

developer_response.body: Thanks Wareix, We really appreciate it! So glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Like every other review has said. It’s Battleship in space. Other than the fact that 4 people can play together and some special weapons it’s nothing more than “Battleship” and that’s not necessarily bad. For $5 if you want a board game that’s like battleship, look no further.
Love this But is there any online players ? Iv tried a few times to find an online player

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Gray! We're glad you're enjoying it, we're aware that it is hard to find players right now, hopefully you can find some players to start a private game with. We're currently working on adding Quest 2/Pro support without MR and a immersive VR mode for both Quest 2/pro and 3/3s, hopefully this will mean more players for multiplayer modes.

reviews.review_title: Well polished top tier board game!
reviews.review_description: Really polished and well presented experience! Feels really good to play with hand tracking. Excited to try this out online or with the family!

developer_response.body: Thanks PolyPunk! We're glad you like the hand tracking! We prefer to play that way too!

reviews.review_description: For 5 Euro this is a must buy game

Just watched Beard In VR's YouTube video on this game (thanks for that) and it was a surprise to me as I have not seen any other info on this game. I purchased it right away because who doesn't love Battleships from back in the day and I'm glad I did. It's a quick sit down, play and enjoy. It works well, looks good and is quite fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! We loved Beard in VRs video! He did such a great job representing the game! Glad you’re enjoying it! Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Amazing gameplay. Well polished graphics.

developer_response.body: Thanks Abhim! Really appreciate the great review! Glad you're enjoying it!

reviews.review_description:
Lots of fun, with an enjoyable campaign mode for single player and a skirmish mode against AI or up to 3 people online. 

Great graphics. Cool setting. 

Love the animations of the AI when I blow their ships up!

developer_response.body: Thanks Carwash! Really glad you're enjoying the game! Great score too! Well played!

reviews.review_description: The reflection of the home planet in the visors is a great touch 👌🏻

developer_response.body: Thanks Angersniper, we appreciate the great review!

reviews.review_description: Great game  love the effects and game play  . Would like to see the volume turned up its a little  quiet. Also I'm on.a quest 2 got it didn't know if it would  work but it does? Can you tell me why. I'm glad it does  i didn't see the requirements before  I got it.

developer_response.body: Hi Bill, We always planned to release for Quest 2, so didn't block the requirements, we have just released an update to replace MR passthrough with a VR background for immersive mode. We're glad you're enjoying it. The volume is set up so that you can hear players in Multiplayer more clearly, hopefully you can find a nice balance with the headset volume and volume controls in the settings menu.

reviews.review_title: A gem of a game. Love it!
reviews.review_description:
Highly addictive and fun, this is a really well made take on the classic battleships game, but this time you're in space. 
Everything is well done, from the game platform itself which you can grab and move around so it's in the perfect position wherever you're sat, to the AI apponents which are basically astronauts that are so human-like in their gestures and movements, that it's sometimes feels uncanny. They make me smile at times as they slump down in defeat, crossing their arms and shaking their head.

The graphics are great, really polished and detailed, from the planets at the center of the board, to the spacecraft, and I particularly like the way the missiles fly, and the mini explosions when you get a hit. It's really satisfying to locate a ship on the board and then destroy it, at which point it breaks up in place. I never get tired of watching those poor tiny little spacemen floating from the wreckage.

So far I have only played solo, as not much of a social player, but i imagine it would be a good time just chilling out and chatting whilst playing this game, especially if you have a friend with a headset.

There are two modes, campaign, and quick play. The campaign is pretty short, but good fun, I've been through it three times now, however I mainly play the quick play matches which are great for just having a quick game now and then, although I usually end up playing a few in a row! 

The only minor issue I've had with the game so far is that sometimes I found it awkward to press a target square on the right-hand side using my right hand. It seemed to be something to do with the special weapons panel being there, causing my clicks to not register properly. Easily remedied by using my left hand though, and doesn't detract from the game, just a tiny annoyance sometimes.

All in all a fantastic little game which you can no doubt get endless hours of fun from, just like the battleships of old. 

Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review LoneWolfVR! We're really glad you're enjoying it! We've flagged pressing the right hand side with your right hand issue, it should be fixed in an upcoming patch!

reviews.review_description: When I was scrolling through the store library I found this wonderful gem, just a great game to play the developers did such an awesome job bringing this old school game style to VR mixed reality,

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review! So glad you’re enjoying it!

reviews.review_title: Battleships in space, This game is Awsum
reviews.review_description: This is like a kids game come true and a fantastic game especially if you are looking for things that wont give you VR sickness. I haven't played in multiplayer yet but the single player quick games with up to 4 enemies is such a blast. Defo worth a buy.

developer_response.body: Thanks MopH3ad, for playing and the great review!

reviews.review_description: I love these MR games especially ones that hold nostalgic value. This is the best battleship style game out there.
Works great in mixed reality, and with friends in the same room
